subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant! His Honour, the Herald of Truth, Mirza Munir, hath opened his tongue in praise and hath adorned the letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر میثاق جناب منادی حق میرزا منیر لسان بستایش گشوده و نامه را آرایش
subcodes.subjects: @high station of teachers of the Cause, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
